zh.lifeSummary: 當Alexander-mac-Henry Sutherland 3rd of Duffus於1403年出生在英國蘇格蘭莫雷度福斯時，他的父親Henry-mac-Nicholas Sutherland Lord Torboll41歲，母親Margaret Moray32歲。他於1433年與Muria Chisholm of Chisholm結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1482年在蘇格蘭艾爾金爾度福斯享年80歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alexander-mac-Henry Sutherland 3rd of Duffus于1403年出生在英国苏格兰莫雷度福斯时，他的父亲Henry-mac-Nicholas Sutherland Lord Torboll41岁，母亲Margaret Moray32岁。他于1433年与Muria Chisholm of Chisholm结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1482年在苏格兰艾爾金爾度福斯享年80岁。

nameMeanings.name: Sutherland
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (Caithness): habitational name from the Scottish county of Sutherland, named with Old Norse súthr ‘south, southern’ + land ‘land’ because the territory lay south of Scandinavia and the Norse colonies in the Orkney and Shetland Islands.
History: This is the name of a Highland Scottish clan associated with the county of Sutherland.

en.lifeSummary: When Alexander-mac-Henry Sutherland 3rd of Duffus was born in 1403, in Duffus, Moray, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Henry-mac-Nicholas Sutherland Lord Torboll, was 41 and his mother, Margaret Moray, was 32. He married Muria Chisholm of Chisholm in 1433. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. He died about 1482, in Duffus, Elginshire, Scotland, at the age of 80.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alexander-mac-Henry Sutherland 3rd of Duffus est né en 1403, à Duffus, Moray, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Henry-mac-Nicholas Sutherland Lord Torboll, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Margaret Moray, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Muria Chisholm of Chisholm en 1433. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé environ 1482, à Duffus, Elginshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 80 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alexander-mac-Henry Sutherland 3rd of Duffus 1403 in Duffus, Moray, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Henry-mac-Nicholas Sutherland Lord Torboll 41 und seine Mutter Margaret Moray 32. Er hat 1433 Muria Chisholm of Chisholm geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb um 1482 im Alter von 80 Jahren in Duffus, Elginshire, Scotland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alexander-mac-Henry Sutherland 3rd of Duffus è nato il nel 1403 nel Duffus, Moray, Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Henry-mac-Nicholas Sutherland Lord Torboll, aveva 41 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Moray, aveva 32 anni. Lui sposato Muria Chisholm of Chisholm nel 1433. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì circa 1482, nel Duffus, Elginshire, Scotland, all'età di 80 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Alexander-mac-Henry Sutherland 3rd of Duffusが1403年にイギリススコットランドモーアイダフウスで生まれた時，父Henry-mac-Nicholas Sutherland Lord Torbollは41歳，母Margaret Morayは32歳であった。1433年にMuria Chisholm of Chisholmと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は約1482年にスコットランドエルジンシュアイアダフウスで80歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alexander-mac-Henry Sutherland 3rd of Duffus(이)가 1403년 영국 스코틀랜드 모라이 더프스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henry-mac-Nicholas Sutherland Lord Torboll(은)는 41세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Moray(은)는 32세였다. 그는 1433년 Muria Chisholm of Chisholm(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1482년 스컷랜드 엘긴실르 더프스에서 80세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Duffus Castle, Morayshire, Scotland: Duffus, Helgyn, Шотланд, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс
mn.Duffus, Moray, Scotland: Duffus, Helgyn, Шотланд, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alexander-mac-Henry Sutherland 3rd of Duffus nasceu em 1403, em Duffus, Moray, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Henry-mac-Nicholas Sutherland Lord Torboll, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Moray, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Muria Chisholm of Chisholm em 1433. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1482, em Duffus, Elginshire, Scotland, com 80 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alexander-mac-Henry Sutherland 3rd of Duffus родился в 1403 г. в местности дуффус, мореи, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Henry-mac-Nicholas Sutherland Lord Torboll было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Margaret Moray, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Muria Chisholm of Chisholm в 1433 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер около 1482 г. в местности дуффус, элгиншир, Шотландия в возрасте 80 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alexander-mac-Henry Sutherland 3rd of Duffus nació en 1403, en Duffus, Moray, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Henry-mac-Nicholas Sutherland Lord Torboll, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Margaret Moray, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Muria Chisholm of Chisholm en 1433. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1482, en Duffus, Elginshire, Scotland, a la edad de 80 años.
